ttl.name: DOOR CONTROL TRANSMITTER (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Install a new battery (lithium battery) with the positive (+) side up as shown in the illustration.
Press down gently on the battery to set it in place.

item.ptxt: Be sure that the positive and negative sides of the transmitter battery are positioned correctly.
Be careful not to bend the terminals of the transmitter battery during installation.
Keep the interior of the transmitter case free of dust, water, and oil.

s2.ptxt: Install the cover by pressing down on it as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: After the installation, press one of the transmitter switches and check that the LED illuminates.
